channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-3064] 133d failed with 2 MDTs
item.description:
== sanity test 133d: Verifying rename_stats ========================================== 05:52:08 (1364475128)
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.rename_stats
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.rename_stats=clear
mkdir 1 for /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d133/stats_testdir1
mkdir 1 for /mnt/lustre/d0.sanity/d133/stats_testdir2
total: 512 creates in 4.14 seconds: 123.65 creates/second
source rename dir size: 32K
target rename dir size: 4K
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.rename_stats=rename_stats:

  • snapshot_time: 1364475131.692463
    sanity test_133d: @@@@@@ FAIL: samedir_rename_size count error
    Trace dump:
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4019:error_noexit()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4042:error()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:8307:test_133d()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4281:run_one()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4314:run_one_logged()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:4184:run_test()
    = /work/lustre-release/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:8340:main()
    Dumping lctl log to /tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/sanity.test_133d.*.1364475135.log
    mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.debug_log.mds.1364475135.log.RdW8qV" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.debug_log.mds.1364475135.log.hezXUZ" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.debug_log.oss.1364475135.log.2Uzrya" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.debug_log.oss.1364475135.log.QHcN0e" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.dmesg.mds.1364475135.log.BsXjot" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.dmesg.mds.1364475135.log.Q9r1Rx" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    mds: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.dmesg.oss.1364475135.log.ChRpVM" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    mds: rsync error: some files/attrs were not transferred (see previous errors) (code 23) at main.c(1039) [sender=3.0.6]
    pdsh@client1: mds: ssh exited with exit code 23
    oss: rsync: chown "/tmp/test_logs/2013-03-28/044432/.sanity.test_133d.dmesg.oss.1364475135.log.H7eVGR" failed: Operation not permitted (1)
    oss: rsync error: some files/attrs were not transferred (see previous errors) (code 23) at main.c(1039) [sender=3.0.6]
    pdsh@client1: oss: ssh exited with exit code 23
    FAIL 133d (16s)

status.description: The issue is considered finished, the resolution is correct. Issues which are closed can be reopened.

comments.comment: since the patch is too tiny, I just merged a few test scripts in to LU-3000. So I will close this one.
